'''zaguyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycobacterium|mycobacterium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycobacterium|mycobacterium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zaguyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zægiyith|zægiyith]] || [[word:zægiyij|zægiyij]] || [[word:zægiyish|zægiyish]] || [[word:zægiyi|zægiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zaguguyuth|zaguguyuth]] || [[word:zaguguyuj|zaguguyuj]] || [[word:zaguguyush|zaguguyush]] || [[word:zaguguyu|zaguguyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zaguyuth|zaguyuth]] || [[word:zaguyuj|zaguyuj]] || [[word:zaguyush|zaguyush]] || [[word:zaguyu|zaguyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zagufyuth|zagufyuth]] || [[word:zagufyuj|zagufyuj]] || [[word:zagufyush|zagufyush]] || [[word:zagufyuf|zagufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zaguyuthu|zaguyuthu]] || [[word:zaguyuju|zaguyuju]] || [[word:zaguyushu|zaguyushu]] || [[word:zaguyuku|zaguyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zaguyuth|zaguyuth]] || [[word:zaguyuj|zaguyuj]] || [[word:zaguyush|zaguyush]] || [[word:zaguyu|zaguyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zaguyuthul|zaguyuthul]] || [[word:zaguyujul|zaguyujul]] || [[word:zaguyushul|zaguyushul]] || [[word:zaguyukul|zaguyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zaguyuthuthu|zaguyuthuthu]] || [[word:zaguyujuju|zaguyujuju]] || [[word:zaguyushushu|zaguyushushu]] || [[word:zaguyuku|zaguyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zaguyuthun|zaguyuthun]] || [[word:zaguyujun|zaguyujun]] || [[word:zaguyushun|zaguyushun]] || [[word:zaguyukun|zaguyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zaguyuthuoro|zaguyuthuoro]] || [[word:zaguyujuoro|zaguyujuoro]] || [[word:zaguyushuoro|zaguyushuoro]] || [[word:zaguyukuoro|zaguyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
